intended_use_full: The Aurora system is intended for general Nuclear Medicine imaging procedures for detection of radioisotope tracer uptake in the patient body. It includes a general purpose Nuclear Medicine system using a variety of scanning modes supported by various acquisition types, and a Computed Tomography system which is intended for enabling attenuation correction and anatomical localization of SPECT images and for standalone head, whole body, cardiac and vascular X-ray Computed Tomography applications.
target_condition: Dynamic renal scintigraphy imaging; renal diseases and disorders
ground_truth: Ground truth contours reviewed and confirmed by an experienced Nuclear Medicine physician
other_metrics: DICE similarity score (average DICE score above predefined success criteria); 4-point Likert scale clinical reader assessment rating segmentation quality as acceptable with minimal user interaction required
